entities.name: DuplicateGroup
entities.context: Data structure representing a group of duplicate workout observations to be resolved

entities.name: Workout Deduplication Logic
entities.context: Python algorithm that identifies and resolves duplicate workout observations by external_id, keeping the earliest as canonical

entities.name: obs_by_workout
entities.context: Dictionary mapping workout IDs to their observation IDs, used to determine safe deletion candidates

entities.name: canonical observation
entities.context: The earliest observation in a duplicate group, retained as the authoritative record

entities.name: workout_id
entities.context: Integer identifier for a workout entity in the data model

entities.name: obs_id
entities.context: Integer identifier for an observation entity in the data model

entities.name: external_id
entities.context: External identifier used as the deduplication key across observations

relationships.context: The dedup algorithm produces DuplicateGroup instances as its output
Algorithm selects the earliest observation as canonical and marks the rest as duplicates
Lookup structure used to determine if all observations in a workout are duplicates before allowing workout deletion
Serves as the grouping key — observations sharing an external_id are evaluated for deduplication
Workouts contain one or more observations; safe deletion requires all obs in a workout to be duplicates
